title: Serban's Fabric
description: A mod that adds sky islands, armor, tools, dimensions and more!
body:
>Serban's Mod contains the following aspects:  

* **Keybinds to toggle Sprint and Sneak from the movements category**    
* **2 new paintings:**   
   - "Coding"
   - "PorianDopa"
* **New ore:**   
   - "Tanzanite Ore"
   - "Deepslate Tanzanite Ore"
   - "Endstone Tanzanite Ore"
   - "Netherrack Tanzanite Ore"
   - "Doranium Ore"(Hint: Netherite Hoe)
* **New crop:**   
   - "Eggplant Crop"
   - "Lettuce Crop"  
* **New seeds:**  
   - "Eggplant seeds"
   - "Lettuce seeds"  
* **New food:**   
   - "Eggplant"
   - "Lettuce"
   - "Dorasteak"  
* **New blocks:**   
   - "Block of Doranium"
   - "Block of Tanzanite"
   - "Tanzanite Lamp"(it glows when you click on it)
   - "Jumpy Block"
   - "Speedy Block"
   - "Levitation Block"
   - "Block of Doranium"
   - "Cloud Block"
   - "Powder Cloud"( It works similarly to powder snow)  
* **New resources:**   
   - "Raw Tanzanite"
   - "Raw Doranium"
   - "Tanzanite"
   - "Doranium"  
* **New items:** 
   - "Eight Ball"(It also has tooltips)
   - "Mighty Eight Ball"(Endgame item to show how good u are at da game)  
* **New villagers:** 
   - "Jump Master"(Need to be put near a "Jumpy Block")
   - "Levitation Master"(Need to be put near a "Levitation Block")  
* **New tools:** 
   - "Tanzanite Sword"
   - "Tanzanite Pickaxe"
   - "Tanzanite Hoe"
   - "Tanzanite Axe"
   - "Tanzanite Shovel"  
* **New portals which go to new dimensions:**   
   - "New World" (Netherrack and a water bucket)
   - "Error World" (Block of Doranium and doranium)
* **New structures:**   
   - Nether Island
   - Lost Castle
   - 5 Sky Islands  
* **New armor:**   
   - Tanzanite Armor 
   - 3D Crown (it can only be found on sky islands at the moment)
